objects.name: Upstream Stage Sensor
objects.description: Measures upstream river level. Provides early warning lead-time trigger.

objects.name: Rainfall Telemetry Gauge
objects.description: Measures local precipitative intensity. Drives overland surface ponding.

objects.name: Perimeter Ditch Ingress sensor
objects.description: Monitors boundary ditch levels and yard low-point water backing.

objects.name: Loading Bay Ingress Sensor
objects.description: Monitors critical flood height threshold at facility entrance.

objects.name: Defensive Barrier Location
objects.description: Location of temporary flood barriers to block loading bay ingress.

objects.name: Electrical Substation
objects.description: Facility power transformer. Severe operational impact if flooded.

objects.name: Finished Stock Area
objects.description: Primary packaging and warehousing floor. High inventory damage value.
